title: He Evicted Me At The Funeral After Getting The Lake Cabin I Renovated. So I Watched A Judge Undo It.
description: After seven years as their sole caregiver and $93,000 of my own money poured into his parents' lake cabin, my brother-in-law handed me an eviction notice at their mother's funeral. A hidden notebook in a small cedar box unlocked the truth that sent him to prison. #JusticeServed #FamilyBetrayal #CaregiverWins
thumb_text: HER NOTE SENT HIM TO FEDERAL PRISON

thumb_lines.text: HE EVICTED ME AT THE FUNERAL
7 YEARS OF CARE, $93K IN RENOVATIONS, AND A HIDDEN TRUTH
A JUDGE RULED THE WILL WAS FORGED
HE WAS HANDCUFFED IN THE TITLE OFFICE
